basic_details.job_title: BEML Operator Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 362 Non-Executive Posts
basic_details.organization_name: BEML Limited (A Govt. of India Undertaking, Ministry of Defence)
basic_details.short_information: BEML Limited has invited online applications for 362 Operator posts on a tenure basis under Advt No. KP/S/10/2026, dated 17 June 2026, for candidates holding ITI certificates in Fitter, Turner, Welder, Machinist, and Electrician trades. The online application closes at 18:00 Hrs on 10 July 2026, and eligibility (age, qualification, experience) is reckoned as on the same date. This BEML Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 is open to Indian Nationals only, with category-wise vacancies and age limits as detailed below.

application_fee.details: The application fee for this recruitment depends on the candidate's category, with certain categories fully exempted from payment. This section gives the exact fee applicable to each category. | The fee is to be paid online at the end of the application form, and once paid, it is non-refundable under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: Candidates checking their eligibility for BEML Operator Recruitment 2026 should know that both educational qualification and age are fixed as on 10 July 2026. This section explains the mandatory ITI qualification and the trade-independent age limit applicable across all five posts. | First-class (60%) marks in the respective ITI trade, along with a National Trade Certificate (NTC) issued by the National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT) Completion of Apprenticeship with a National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC) in the respective trade issued by the Directorate General of Training (DGT) Candidates must have completed the ITI course under the Conventional Training Pattern of the Craftsmen Training Scheme as a regular candidate | Candidates from SC/ST/PwD categories get a 5% relaxation in the minimum qualifying percentage, meaning they need only 55% instead of 60% in their respective trade. | Candidates asking about age relaxation can note that SC/ST candidates get a 5-year relaxation and OBC candidates get a 3-year relaxation over the General age limit. PwD candidates receive an additional 10 years of relaxation over and above the relaxation applicable to their SC/ST/OBC-NCL category, provided they have a minimum 40% disability.

qualification.details: Candidates checking their eligibility for BEML Operator Recruitment 2026 should know that both educational qualification and age are fixed as on 10 July 2026. This section explains the mandatory ITI qualification and the trade-independent age limit applicable across all five posts.

salary_details.hra: As applicable at place of posting, if Company Quarters not provided
salary_details.details: Candidates curious about in-hand pay during the tenure period can refer to the monthly pay structure below, which applies uniformly to all Operator posts on tenure basis. | An annual increment of 3% on Basic Pay is admissible during the tenure, subject to satisfactory performance. Provident Fund is calculated on Basic Pay plus DA, and selected candidates are also entitled to Gratuity (as per the Gratuity Scheme) and Bonus (as per the Bonus Act). The engagement itself is on a tenure basis for a maximum of four years and does not confer regular employee status. | In-Hand Salary Calculator 2026

selection_process: Candidates wondering how BEML will select Operators for these 362 posts can note that the process involves a Computer Based Written Test
conducted broadly in the sequence below.
Computer Based Written Test: Conducted over 2 hours
with three parts — Part-I: 20 questions on General Awareness
Part-III: 60 questions on the concerned Discipline. Each question carries 1 mark
and there is no negative marking. Result and Shortlisting: The qualifying mark is fixed at 45%
relaxed to 40% (5% relaxation) for SC/ST/PwD candidates. Shortlisting is done purely on written test performance. Document Verification: Candidates are called in order of merit
limited to the number of positions notified per trade/category

where original certificates and one set of self-attested photocopies must be produced. Travelling Allowance: Candidates who qualify document verification are reimbursed Sleeper Class/II Class train or bus fare by the shortest route

on production of proof of travel. Provisional Offer and Medical Examination: Candidates clearing document verification receive a Provisional Offer and must undergo a pre-employment medical examination
with no relaxation in health standards. Final Offer of Engagement: Issued only after a satisfactory medical report is received from the Company's doctor.
Candidates should note that mere fulfilment of eligibility conditions does not guarantee selection
and BEML Management reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates or increase the qualifying percentage based on the volume of applications received.
how_to_apply: This section explains the exact process candidates must follow to submit their application before the portal closes on 10 July 2026.
Visit the BEML career page at www.bemlindia.in
Locate the online application form under Advt No. KP/S/10/2026
Register using a valid personal e-mail ID and mobile number that will remain active for at least one year
Fill in personal, educational, and category details accurately
Upload all mandatory documents (listed below) in the prescribed format
Pay the applicable application fee online (GEN/EWS/OBC candidates only)
Submit the form and note down the generated Registration Number for future reference

Candidates can use the Apply Online link only until 18:00 Hrs on 10 July 2026, after which the registration site will close. No request for change in category, address, e-mail, mobile number, or test centre location will be entertained once submitted.

rows.details: BEML Limited (A Govt. of India Undertaking, Ministry of Defence)
ITI Fitter, Turner, Welder, Machinist, Electrician

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for BEML Non-Executive Recruitment 2026

rows.event: Reckoning Date for Age, Qualification & Experience

content_sections.heading: BEML Operator Vacancy Breakdown 2026 (Trade and Category-wise)
content_sections.text: Candidates searching for trade-wise or category-wise vacancy details can refer to the table below, which breaks down all 362 Operator posts across five ITI trades and five reservation categories. Fitter has the highest number of vacancies at 127 posts, followed by Turner with 93 posts, making these two trades the most competitive among the five disciplines on offer.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria - Qualification and Age Limit
content_sections.text: Candidates checking their eligibility for BEML Operator Recruitment 2026 should know that both educational qualification and age are fixed as on 10 July 2026. This section explains the mandatory ITI qualification and the trade-independent age limit applicable across all five posts. First-class (60%) marks in the respective ITI trade, along with a National Trade Certificate (NTC) issued by the National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT) Completion of Apprenticeship with a National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC) in the respective trade issued by the Directorate General of Training (DGT) Candidates must have completed the ITI course under the Conventional Training Pattern of the Craftsmen Training Scheme as a regular candidate Candidates from SC/ST/PwD categories get a 5% relaxation in the minimum qualifying percentage, meaning they need only 55% instead of 60% in their respective trade. Candidates asking about age relaxation can note that SC/ST candidates get a 5-year relaxation and OBC candidates get a 3-year relaxation over the General age limit. PwD candidates receive an additional 10 years of relaxation over and above the relaxation applicable to their SC/ST/OBC-NCL category, provided they have a minimum 40% disability.

content_sections.heading: BEML Operator Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee for this recruitment depends on the candidate's category, with certain categories fully exempted from payment. This section gives the exact fee applicable to each category. The fee is to be paid online at the end of the application form, and once paid, it is non-refundable under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: BEML Operator Selection Process 2026 - Step-by-Step
content_sections.text: Candidates wondering how BEML will select Operators for these 362 posts can note that the process involves a Computer Based Written Test, document verification, and a pre-employment medical examination, conducted broadly in the sequence below. Computer Based Written Test: Conducted over 2 hours, with three parts — Part-I: 20 questions on General Awareness, Part-II: 20 questions on English & Reasoning, Part-III: 60 questions on the concerned Discipline. Each question carries 1 mark, and there is no negative marking. Result and Shortlisting: The qualifying mark is fixed at 45%, relaxed to 40% (5% relaxation) for SC/ST/PwD candidates. Shortlisting is done purely on written test performance. Document Verification: Candidates are called in order of merit, limited to the number of positions notified per trade/category, where original certificates and one set of self-attested photocopies must be produced. Travelling Allowance: Candidates who qualify document verification are reimbursed Sleeper Class/II Class train or bus fare by the shortest route, on production of proof of travel. Provisional Offer and Medical Examination: Candidates clearing document verification receive a Provisional Offer and must undergo a pre-employment medical examination, with no relaxation in health standards. Final Offer of Engagement: Issued only after a satisfactory medical report is received from the Company's doctor. Candidates should note that mere fulfilment of eligibility conditions does not guarantee selection, and BEML Management reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates or increase the qualifying percentage based on the volume of applications received.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online for BEML Operator Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This section explains the exact process candidates must follow to submit their application before the portal closes on 10 July 2026. Visit the BEML career page at www.bemlindia.in Locate the online application form under Advt No. KP/S/10/2026 Register using a valid personal e-mail ID and mobile number that will remain active for at least one year Fill in personal, educational, and category details accurately Upload all mandatory documents (listed below) in the prescribed format Pay the applicable application fee online (GEN/EWS/OBC candidates only) Submit the form and note down the generated Registration Number for future reference Candidates can use the Apply Online link only until 18:00 Hrs on 10 July 2026, after which the registration site will close. No request for change in category, address, e-mail, mobile number, or test centre location will be entertained once submitted.

content_sections.heading: BEML Operator Salary and Pay Structure 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates curious about in-hand pay during the tenure period can refer to the monthly pay structure below, which applies uniformly to all Operator posts on tenure basis. An annual increment of 3% on Basic Pay is admissible during the tenure, subject to satisfactory performance. Provident Fund is calculated on Basic Pay plus DA, and selected candidates are also entitled to Gratuity (as per the Gratuity Scheme) and Bonus (as per the Bonus Act). The engagement itself is on a tenure basis for a maximum of four years and does not confer regular employee status. In-Hand Salary Calculator 2026

rows.amount: As applicable at place of posting, if Company Quarters not provided

content_sections.heading: Documents Required While Applying Online
content_sections.text: Candidates often ask what documents are needed beforehand to avoid application rejection — this section lists every mandatory upload required to complete the BEML Operator online application successfully. Recent photograph and signature (on clear white background, signature in black ink) 10th Standard (X-th) marks card ITI - National Trade Certificate (NTC); provisional certificate accepted if final certificate is not yet issued All ITI marks cards as a single PDF (CGPA-to-percentage conversion certificate required, if applicable) National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC) issued by DGT Experience certificate(s) clearly indicating start and end dates, combined as a single PDF Identity card issued by the Government of India (Aadhaar, Passport, Driving Licence, PAN Card, etc.) Caste/Category Certificate (SC/ST/OBC-NCL/EWS) and PwD Certificate, as applicable Applications submitted without uploading these documents will be treated as incomplete and summarily rejected, so candidates should keep scanned copies ready before starting the online form.

content_sections.heading: Troubleshooting and Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Many candidates lose out on otherwise eligible applications due to small, avoidable errors. This section highlights frequent mistakes applicants should watch out for while applying for this BEML recruitment. Uploading provisional instead of required documents: NTC provisional certificates are accepted, but candidates should still keep the final certificate ready for the joining stage. Entering an inactive e-mail or mobile number: Since all communication, including offer letters, is sent only via the registered e-mail, candidates should use an ID and number valid for at least one year. Ignoring the OBC-NCL certificate validity: The OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) certificate must not be older than six months as on the last date of online application submission, so candidates should get an updated certificate if their existing one is outdated. Missing the CGPA conversion certificate: Candidates with CGPA/credit-based ITI marksheets must attach the official conversion formula/certificate, or their application may be treated as incomplete. Requesting changes after submission: Category, address, e-mail, mobile number, or test centre preference cannot be modified after submission, so candidates should double-check all entries before the final submit. Applying without verifying eligibility: Only candidates who fully meet the qualification, age, and category criteria as on 10 July 2026 should apply, since candidature found ineligible at any stage will be cancelled, even after appointment.

faq.question: Q1. Has BEML released the Operator Recruitment Notification 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, BEML Limited has released the recruitment notification for 362 Operator posts on tenure basis vide Advt No. KP/S/10/2026 dated 17 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply online for BEML Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application closes at 18:00 Hrs on 10 July 2026, and no extension has been indicated in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available under this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 362 vacancies are available across five ITI trades — Fitter (127), Turner (93), Welder (44), Machinist (40), and Electrician (58).

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for BEML Operator posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a First-class (60%) ITI certificate in the respective trade with NTC from NCVT, along with a National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC) from DGT, as on 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for BEML Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 29 years for GEN/EWS, 34 years for SC/ST, and 32 years for OBC candidates, as on 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: GEN/EWS/OBC candidates must pay a non-refundable fee of Rs. 200/-, while SC/ST/PwD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BEML Operator posts?
faq.answer: Selection involves a Computer Based Written Test (100 questions, no negative marking), followed by document verification and a pre-employment medical examination.

faq.question: Q8. What salary will selected Operators receive?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a Basic Pay of Rs. 16,900/- per month, plus Dearness Allowance, HRA, a Medical Allowance of Rs. 1,500/-, and applicable perks.

faq.question: Q9. How can candidates apply for BEML Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online only through the official BEML career page at www.bemlindia.in by registering, filling the form, and uploading all mandatory documents before the deadline.

faq.question: Q10. What is the tenure of engagement for selected candidates?
faq.answer: The engagement is on a tenure basis for a maximum period of four years from the date of joining, and it does not confer regular employee status.
